items.title: Why Salesforce CEO Marc Benioff has seen his stock totally sit out the 2025 AI boom
items.description: Salesforce co-founder and CEO Marc Benioff may be happy this week's Dreamforce is over.

items.title: Consumer Tech News (Oct 13-17): Elon Musk's Starlink Under US Probe, Salesforce Eyes $60B Revenue, Apple Launches M5 Chip And More
items.description: U.S. Congress probes Elon Musk's Starlink over Myanmar links as Apple unveils M5 chip, TSMC beats earnings, and Salesforce targets $60B revenue by FY2030.

items.title: Jim Cramer on Salesforce: “It’s Making a Very Big Push into the Enterprise”
items.description: Salesforce, Inc. (NYSE:CRM) is one of the stocks Jim Cramer was focused on recently. Cramer discussed the company CEO’s keynote speech and stated: “Well, it’s making a very big push into the enterprise using its own AI. But after CEO Marc Benioff’s keynote speech at Dreamforce about his Agentforce initiative, the stock actually got dinged […]
